name: GPO Plus, Inc.
business: GPO Plus, Inc. operates as a Direct Store Delivery (DSD) distribution company, distributing fast-moving consumer goods to convenience stores and gas stations. It also manufactures some products in-house and uses its PRISM+ technology platform for logistics.

exposures.sentence: Our in-house technology platform, PRISM+, is at the core of our operations, designed to streamline the distribution process.
We distribute and manufacture high-demand products, making us a pivotal player in the convenience retail ecosystem.

tamClaims.claim: In 2023, the United States boasted approximately 152,396 convenience stores and gas stations.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2023, the United States boasted approximately 152,396 convenience stores and gas stations, with single-store operators making up 96,161 (63.1%) of these establishments, indicating a strong presence of independent ownership within the market.

tamClaims.claim: Total industry revenues approached $860 Billion for the year, with $532.2 Billion derived from motor fuel sales and $327.6 Billion from in-store sales.
tamClaims.sentence: Total industry revenues approached $860 Billion for the year, with $532.2 Billion derived from motor fuel sales and $327.6 Billion from in-store sales, highlighting the significant revenue potential beyond just fuel.
